message:
feat(fsfs): overhaul release asset system for v1.1.2 with Windows support and SHA256SUMS, refactor pipeline dedup logic

Release/update system overhaul in frankensearch-fsfs:
- Bump version from 0.1.0 to 1.1.2 in both workspace Cargo.toml and
  crate Cargo.toml
- Add Windows target triple detection (x86_64-pc-windows-msvc,
  aarch64-pc-windows-msvc)
- Switch release asset naming from `fsfs-{triple}.tar.xz` to
  `fsfs-{version}-{triple}.{ext}` with .zip for Windows and .tar.xz
  for Unix platforms
- Replace per-artifact .sha256 sidecar files with a single consolidated
  SHA256SUMS file per release (standard format: `<hash>  <filename>`)
- Add `extract_hash_from_sums()` to parse the SHA256SUMS manifest and
  look up the correct hash for each asset filename
- Handle zip extraction for Windows archives alongside existing tar.xz
- Improve TUI search dashboard UX: add startup hint, error recovery
  messages, and timing-based exit suggestions
- Add new struct fields for embedding degradation telemetry in index
  snapshots (embedding_retries, embedding_failures,
  semantic_deferred_files, embedder_degraded, degradation_reason,
  recent_warnings)
- Add tests: Windows zip URL format, SHA256SUMS parsing (found + missing),
  updated existing URL format assertions

Pipeline dedup refactor in frankensearch-storage:
- Simplify the dual-embedder dedup logic by computing both fast_dedup and
  quality_dedup upfront, then using boolean flags (fast_needs_enqueue,
  quality_needs_enqueue) to gate job creation
- Eliminate the redundant "fast unchanged but quality needs requeue" code
  path that duplicated most of the main enqueue logic
- Only call reset_embedding_status when fast_dedup state is Changed
  (previously called unconditionally when had_existing_row)
- Move src_strides computation outside the inner loop in repeat operation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-fsfs"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "1.1.2"
 description = "Standalone fsfs CLI for two-tier hybrid local search"
 edition.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
